## Checklist before submitting PR

- [ ] Role doesn't duplicate an existing role
- [ ] Rank level is appropriate for the authority described
- [ ] Reports-to role already exists in the spec
- [ ] Will use `templates/role-template.md`
- [ ] Will pass `corpai lint --strict`
